parameters.subject: =={{'Booking Confirmed: ' + $json.booking_id}}

parameters.text:
👋 *Welcome to the Booking Assistant!*

Here's what you can do:

📋 /catalog — Browse available services
📝 *book P001* — Book a service (replace P001 with the service ID)
❓ /help — Show all commands
❌ /cancel — Cancel current session

_Type /catalog to get started._

❌ *Booking cancelled\.* Your session has been cleared\.

Type /catalog to browse services or *book \<ID\>* to start a new booking\.

❓ *Booking Assistant — Help*

*Commands:*
📋 /catalog — View all available services
📝 *book \<ID\>* — Start booking (e.g. `book P001`)
❌ /cancel — Cancel your current booking session
❓ /help — Show this help message

*How to book step by step:*
1\. Type /catalog to see all services and their IDs
2\. Type `book P001` \(use the real service ID\)
3\. Enter your full name when asked
4\. Enter your email address when asked
5\. Review the summary and reply *YES* to confirm or *NO* to cancel

🔍 I couldn't find an exact match for that\.

Type /catalog to see all available services, or try `book P001` with a specific service ID from the catalog\.
